problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: If Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins is applied to they, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
